manual_review.evidence: Executed CMS-WO-12 Layout Builder per PATCH 8 requirements. Created blockRegistry.ts as single source of truth. Refactored PageRenderer and BlockRenderer to use dynamic registry mapping. Built PageLayoutBuilder admin interface for drag/drop grid and rail configuration with inline prop editing.

blockRegistry_exists.evidence: src/lib/cms/blockRegistry.ts explicitly defines block types, props, defaults

BlockRenderer_refactored.evidence: src/components/cms/BlockRenderer.tsx updated to pull dynamically from blockRegistry

AdminUI_builder_created.evidence: src/pages/admin/cms/PageLayoutBuilder.tsx allows drag-and-drop from palette to canvas and edits overrides

CmsPagesList_routing_wired.evidence: App.tsx handles /admin/cms/pages/:id/builder, CmsPagesList provides navigation link
